items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Gemelli Messenger Bag. Today I want to share a super practical crossbody bag. The Gemelli Messenger features a simple and elegant design with a perfect score for practicality! The lightweight design and compact body make it easy to carry for shopping or trips, making you feel lively. The shoulder strap is detachable, allowing you to DIY it into a chain strap or a short underarm strap. Plus, this strap is wider, making the comfort level go up! up! up!
items.name_cn:
BOTTEGA VENETA New Gemelli Messenger Bag. Today I want to share a super practical crossbody bag. The Gemelli Messenger features a simple and elegant design with a perfect score for practicality! The lightweight design and compact body make it easy to carry for shopping or trips, making you feel lively. The shoulder strap is detachable, allowing you to DIY it into a chain strap or a short underarm strap. Plus, this strap is wider, making the comfort level go up! up! up!
Style No.: 796638
Dimensions: 26*15*8cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Large Hop. This large shoulder bag is stitched with mint, white, and berry leather strips, evoking the animal skin skirts of primitive tribes with an exotic flair. The 2024 show color blocking is very premium, mimicking tropical rainforest elements. The multiple leather strips woven in various colors create a large, lightweight silhouette, and the leather is surprisingly light and soft.

items.name_en: BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
items.name_cn:
BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
The inverted triangle metal buckle is stylish and unisex. BV woven bag # seamless body
A treasure bag, the entire handbag is made from a single piece of leather, requiring 20M wadding tubular strips. The body shows no seams, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. The crepe technique calf leather feels amazing, like a squishy BV bag.
High-craftsmanship Rumple Messenger, newly arrived. Adjustable length, shoulder or crossbody is fine. You deserve it!
Style: 776519
Size: 30*23*7.5cm (Strap length 55cm)

specs.rawTitle:
BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
The inverted triangle metal buckle is stylish and unisex. BV woven bag # seamless body
A treasure bag, the entire handbag is made from a single piece of leather, requiring 20M wadding tubular strips. The body shows no seams, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. The crepe technique calf leather feels amazing, like a squishy BV bag.
High-craftsmanship Rumple Messenger, newly arrived. Adjustable length, shoulder or crossbody is fine. You deserve it!
Style: 776519
Size: 30*23*7.5cm (Strap length 55cm)

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Small Zigzag Shoulder Bag. The twisted structure cowhide backpack is unrecognizable as a new BV at first glance, only featuring the classic weave on the strap, making the bag simple and casual yet still stylish. Paired with autumn wear, it instantly recalls last year's popular Mocha style.
items.name_cn:
BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Small Zigzag Shoulder Bag. The twisted structure cowhide backpack is unrecognizable as a new BV at first glance, only featuring the classic weave on the strap, making the bag simple and casual yet still stylish. Paired with autumn wear, it instantly recalls last year's popular Mocha style.
Style: 787117
Size: 38*30*0cm

items.name_en: The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric, paired with chestnut leather, exudes a vintage vibe. A refreshing change from the all-leather version, it has a unique charm.
